creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
On recent CURRENT (FreeBSD 11.0-CURRENT #0 r295622: Mon Feb 15 07:33:17 CET 2016 amd64), building port www/nghttp2 which is required by icinga2 fails to update/build due to the follwoing error since to the most recent update of the ports tree:


[...]
In file included from shrpx_accept_handler.cc:28:
/usr/include/unistd.h:511:6: error: declaration of 'initgroups' has a different language linkage
int      initgroups(const char *, gid_t);
         ^
./shrpx.h:48:12: note: previous definition is here
inline int initgroups(const char *user, gid_t group) { return 0; }
           ^
  CXX      libnghttpx_a-shrpx_http2_upstream.o
In file included from shrpx_config.cc:42:
/usr/include/unistd.h:511:6: error: declaration of 'initgroups' has a different language linkage
int      initgroups(const char *, gid_t);
         ^
./shrpx.h:48:12: note: previous definition is here
inline int initgroups(const char *user, gid_t group) { return 0; }
           ^
In file included from shrpx_client_handler.cc:28:
/usr/include/unistd.h:511:6: error: declaration of 'initgroups' has a different language linkage
int      initgroups(const char *, gid_t);
         ^
./shrpx.h:48:12: note: previous definition is here
inline int initgroups(const char *user, gid_t group) { return 0; }
           ^
  CXX      libnghttpx_a-shrpx_https_upstream.o
In file included from shrpx_connection_handler.cc:28:
/usr/include/unistd.h:511:6: error: declaration of 'initgroups' has a different language linkage
int      initgroups(const char *, gid_t);
         ^
./shrpx.h:48:12: note: previous definition is here
inline int initgroups(const char *user, gid_t group) { return 0; }
